notifyAllPlayersConnected() - Method in class Network.Client.ClientController
 
notifyAllPlayersConnected() - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that all the players needet to start the game are connected
notifyAllPlayersConnected() - Method in interface Network.Client.RMI.VirtualView
 
notifyAllPlayersConnected() - Method in class Network.Server.Socket.SocketClientHandler
This method is used to notify that all players are connected
notifyAnotherPlayerSettingNumOfPlayers() - Method in class Network.Client.ClientController
notify another player is selecting the number of players and tries again the connection
notifyAnotherPlayerSettingNumOfPlayers() - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the server is waiting for another player to set the number of players
notifyAnotherPlayerSettingNumOfPlayers() - Method in interface Network.Client.RMI.VirtualView
 
notifyAnotherPlayerSettingNumOfPlayers() - Method in class Network.Server.Socket.SocketClientHandler
This method is used to notify another player that a player is setting the number of players
notifyGameAlreadyStarted() - Method in class Network.Client.ClientController
 
notifyGameAlreadyStarted() - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the game is already started
notifyGameAlreadyStarted() - Method in interface Network.Client.RMI.VirtualView
 
notifyGameAlreadyStarted() - Method in class Network.Server.Socket.SocketClientHandler
This method is used to notify that the game is already started
notifyGameFinished(LinkedHashMap<String, ArrayList<Integer>>) - Method in class Network.Client.ClientController
 
notifyGameFinished(LinkedHashMap<String, ArrayList<Integer>>) - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the game is finished
notifyGameFinished(LinkedHashMap<String, ArrayList<Integer>>) - Method in interface Network.Client.RMI.VirtualView
 
notifyGameFinished(LinkedHashMap<String, ArrayList<Integer>>) - Method in class Network.Server.Socket.SocketClientHandler
This method is used to notify the game is finished

notifyNicknameAlreadyTaken() - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the nickname is already taken
notifyNicknameAlreadyTaken() - Method in interface Network.Client.RMI.VirtualView
 
notifyNicknameAlreadyTaken() - Method in class Network.Server.Socket.SocketClientHandler
This method is used to notify that the nickname is already taken
notifyObservers(Message) - Method in class observers.ObservableModel
This method is used to notify all observers
notifyResultOfCardAddedToStation(boolean, String) - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the result of the card added to the station is received
notifyResultOfCardAddedToStation(boolean, String) - Method in interface Network.Client.RMI.VirtualView

This method is used to notify the result of the card added to the station
notifySpecificObserver(String, Message) - Method in class observers.ObservableModel
This method is used to notify a specific observer
notifyStartSetupOfStartingCard() - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the server is ready to start the setup of the starting card

notifyStartSetupOfStartingCard() - Method in class Network.Server.Socket.SocketClientHandler
This method is used to notify the start of the setup of the starting card

notifyTokenAlreadyTaken() - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the token is already taken
notifyTokenAlreadyTaken() - Method in interface Network.Client.RMI.VirtualView
 
notifyTokenAlreadyTaken() - Method in class Network.Server.Socket.SocketClientHandler
This method is used to notify that the token is already taken
notifyWaitingForPlayersToJoin() - Method in class Network.Client.ClientController
 
notifyWaitingForPlayersToJoin() - Method in class Network.Client.RMI.RmiClientToServer
This method is used to notify the client controller that the server is waiting for all the players to join

This method is used to notify that the game is waiting for players to join
